errors.loadUnassigned: Unassigned conversations could not be loaded.
errors.assignClinicAndPatientFirst: Assign a clinic and patient before creating an appointment.
errors.requestCreateFailed: Appointment request could not be created.
errors.appointmentRequiredFields: Practitioner, service, date and time are required.

confirm.convertToRequest: Do you want to convert this WhatsApp conversation to an appointment request?

actions.appointmentDisabledHint: Available after clinic and patient are assigned

detail.partialHistory: Only the last message is shown for this conversation.

appointment.title: Create Appointment
appointment.sourceNotice: This appointment is being created from a WhatsApp conversation.

resolveModal.title: Assign to Clinic
resolveModal.description: Assign the conversation from {{phone}} to a clinic.

connections.title: WhatsApp Connections
connections.subtitle: Manage WhatsApp connections across the organization
connections.providerInfo: {{evolution}} and {{meta}} are supported. Evolution API can be configured manually; Meta can use Embedded Signup or manual token entry.
connections.empty: No WhatsApp connection has been added yet.
connections.noBranchesAssigned: No branch has been assigned yet
connections.metaNoQr: Meta Cloud API does not use QR; account verification is completed via "Connect with Meta".
connections.inactiveWarning: Connection is disabled; messages cannot be sent from this line.

metaPanel.title: Meta (WhatsApp Business) Connection
metaPanel.ready: Meta Embedded Signup is configured. Click the button to connect your account.
metaPanel.notConfiguredPrefix: Meta Embedded Signup is not configured on this server.
metaPanel.manualHint: For manual setup, choose "New Connection" > "Meta Cloud API".
metaPanel.notConfiguredTitle: Meta Embedded Signup is not configured

legacy.title: Existing Evolution API Connection Found in Environment Variables
legacy.description: This connection currently runs from server environment variables. Import it into the panel to edit, test and assign it to branches.
legacy.note: Note: A connection from environment variables cannot be deleted directly from the panel. To remove it completely, clear the server environment variables.
legacy.afterImport: After import: Edit, Test, Assign Branch and Disable actions become available.

token.expired: Meta access token has expired; renew the connection.
token.expiring: Meta access token will expire soon; plan a token renewal.
token.unknown: Token validity date is unknown; token information has not been entered.
token.unknownShort: Unknown; token information has not been entered

qr.metaNotUsed: Meta Cloud API does not use QR codes. Connect the account with "Connect with Meta" or manual configuration.
qr.connectWithQr: Connect WhatsApp with the QR code:
qr.empty: QR code is not available; the connection may already be active.

deleteModal.title: Delete Connection
deleteModal.confirm: "{{name}}" connection will be deleted. Are you sure?
deleteModal.branchWarning: If this connection is deleted, linked branches cannot send WhatsApp messages.
deleteModal.historyWarning: If message history exists, deletion is blocked; use "Disable" instead.

modal.name: Connection Name
modal.metaManualAllowed: Meta Embedded Signup is not configured on the server. You can still create a connection with manual token entry.
modal.apiKeyEncryptedHint: The API key is stored encrypted server-side with AES-256-GCM. Entering a new value permanently replaces the old key.
modal.metaManualHint: Alternatively, enter Meta Business Manager > WhatsApp > API Setup details manually below.
modal.metaEmbeddedDescription: The clinic connects its own WhatsApp Business account and phone number through Meta.
modal.metaEmbeddedNotReady: Meta Embedded Signup is not configured on this deployment. Use advanced manual setup below to connect this WhatsApp Business account instead.

advancedManualSetup.hint: For technical/admin fallback only — most clinics should use "Connect with Meta" above. Tokens and secrets are never shown again after saving.

modal.accessTokenEncryptedHint: The access token is stored encrypted server-side with AES-256-GCM. Entering a new value permanently replaces the old token.
modal.branchAssignmentHint: Select which branches can use this connection. Multiple branches can be selected for a shared line.
modal.noBranchSelected: No branch selected. This connection will be saved but cannot be used for sending messages.

confirm.disconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect "{{name}}"?
confirm.importLegacy: Existing Evolution API settings from environment variables will be imported into the database. Continue?

success.alreadyImported: This connection had already been imported.
success.imported: Evolution API connection successfully imported into the database.

errors.loadFailed: WhatsApp connections could not be loaded.
errors.deleteHasHistory: "{{name}}" could not be deleted: message history exists. Use the "Disable" button instead.
errors.metaMissingCode: Meta authorization could not be completed: code was not received.
errors.metaCreateFailed: Meta connection could not be created.
